environment_discovery.launch_identity_correction: The initial same-name launch resolved to the installed Program Files executable and was discarded; an identical uniquely named artifact was then confirmed as the exact dist process.
environment_discovery.windows_state_capture: Exact-build screenshot capture failed with SetIsBorderRequired/interface not supported (0x80004002); exact-build text-only UI Automation succeeded in an earlier run.
environment_discovery.text_only_ui_automation: Exact build exposed a 176-element tree with names, roles, states, and table values.
environment_discovery.keyboard_probe: The focused-element report remained on global search while keyboard behaviour changed the active route to Analytics; input calls also timed out intermittently, so no focus or keyboard verdict was accepted.

owner_keyboard_observation.environment: single 1920x1080 display; logical DPI 96; exact frozen build
confirmed: Visible focus was observed and moved between controls.
The requested Tab sweep did not become trapped.
No clipped or overlapping text was observed in the displayed state.
owner_keyboard_observation.theme_result: Keyboard traversal continued to work after switching from light to dark, but dark theme exposed white fallback strips on native table, scrollbar, tab, progress, and controller-owned search surfaces.
owner_keyboard_observation.status_policy: Partial owner observation only; no cell promoted.

environment_discovery.observation_boundary: Exact artifact identity, a text-only UIA tree, and owner-observed visible moving focus were recorded, but complete keyboard, screenshot, Narrator, DPI, and reliable focus-order evidence were not; no native cell promoted.
